sourcesContent:
export const INITIAL_SUPPLIERS = [
  { id: 's1', name: 'Agri-Harvest Ltd', category: 'Produce', country: 'UK', risk: 'high', initials: 'AH', color: '#cfe2ff', textColor: '#0a58ca' },
  { id: 's2', name: 'DairyFresh Co', category: 'Dairy', country: 'Ireland', risk: 'low', initials: 'DF', color: '#d1e7dd', textColor: '#0a3622' },
  { id: 's3', name: 'MedGrain Suppliers', category: 'Grains', country: 'Germany', risk: 'medium', initials: 'MG', color: '#fff3cd', textColor: '#664d03' },
  { id: 's4', name: 'FreshPack India', category: 'Packaging', country: 'India', risk: 'medium', initials: 'FP', color: '#f8d7da', textColor: '#842029' },
  { id: 's5', name: 'SpiceBlend GmbH', category: 'Spices', country: 'Germany', risk: 'low', initials: 'SB', color: '#d1e7dd', textColor: '#0a3622' },
  { id: 's6', name: 'ProMeat GmbH', category: 'Meat', country: 'Germany', risk: 'high', initials: 'PM', color: '#cfe2ff', textColor: '#0a58ca' },
  { id: 's7', name: 'AquaSpring Ltd', category: 'Seafood', country: 'Norway', risk: 'medium', initials: 'AS', color: '#fff3cd', textColor: '#664d03' },
];

export const INITIAL_CERTS = [
  { id: 'c1', supplierId: 's1', name: 'HACCP', status: 'expiring', expiry: '2026-03-22' },
  { id: 'c2', supplierId: 's1', name: 'BRC Grade A', status: 'valid', expiry: '2026-08-10' },
  { id: 'c3', supplierId: 's1', name: 'ISO 22000', status: 'valid', expiry: '2026-12-01' },
  { id: 'c4', supplierId: 's1', name: 'Allergen Declaration', status: 'warning', expiry: '2026-04-15' },
  { id: 'c5', supplierId: 's2', name: 'HACCP', status: 'valid', expiry: '2027-01-20' },
  { id: 'c6', supplierId: 's2', name: 'ISO 22000', status: 'valid', expiry: '2027-03-01' },
  { id: 'c7', supplierId: 's3', name: 'ISO 22000', status: 'expiring', expiry: '2026-04-13' },
  { id: 'c8', supplierId: 's6', name: 'BRC Grade A', status: 'expiring', expiry: '2026-04-04' },
];

export const INITIAL_QUERIES = [
  {
    id: 'q1', supplierId: 's1', supplierName: 'Agri-Harvest Ltd',
    type: 'Certificate', subject: 'HACCP Certificate Renewal Required',
    priority: 'high', status: 'pending',
    raisedBy: 'Sarah Mitchell', raisedDate: '2026-02-07',
    dueDate: '2026-02-28',
    messages: [
      { id: 'm1', sender: 'Sarah Mitchell', direction: 'out', text: 'Please provide your updated HACCP certificate. Current one expires in 5 days. This is urgent.', date: '2026-02-07' },
      { id: 'm2', sender: 'Agri-Harvest Portal', direction: 'in', text: 'Hi Sarah, we are in the process of renewal. Auditor visit scheduled next week.', date: '2026-02-10' },
      { id: 'm3', sender: 'Sarah Mitchell', direction: 'out', text: 'Noted. Please submit within 7 days or supply may be suspended per policy.', date: '2026-02-10' },
      { id: 'm4', sender: 'Agri-Harvest Portal', direction: 'in', text: 'Understood. Attaching interim audit report as evidence of renewal in progress.', date: '2026-02-15' },
    ],
    attachments: [
      { name: 'interim-audit-report.pdf', uploadedBy: 'Agri-Harvest', date: '2026-02-15' },
      { name: 'haccp-current-cert.pdf', uploadedBy: 'QA Team', date: '2026-02-07' },
    ],
    timeline: [
      { step: 'Query submitted', date: '2026-02-07', done: true, note: '' },
      { step: 'Acknowledged by supplier', date: '2026-02-10', done: true, note: 'Auditor visit scheduled' },
      { step: 'Under review', date: '2026-02-15', active: true, note: 'Interim docs received' },
      { step: 'Awaiting final certificate', date: '', done: false, warning: 'Overdue · 8 days past SLA' },
      { step: 'Resolved / Rejected', date: '', done: false },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'q2', supplierId: 's6', supplierName: 'ProMeat GmbH',
    type: 'Allergen', subject: 'Allergen Declaration Missing',
    priority: 'high', status: 'review',
    raisedBy: 'James Okafor', raisedDate: '2026-03-05',
    dueDate: '2026-03-25',
    messages: [
      { id: 'm1', sender: 'James Okafor', direction: 'out', text: 'Your allergen declaration is missing from the latest product batch docs. Please submit.', date: '2026-03-05' },
      { id: 'm2', sender: 'ProMeat Portal', direction: 'in', text: 'We will have this ready by end of week.', date: '2026-03-07' },
    ],
    attachments: [],
    timeline: [
      { step: 'Query submitted', date: '2026-03-05', done: true },
      { step: 'Acknowledged by supplier', date: '2026-03-07', done: true },
      { step: 'Under review', date: '', active: true },
      { step: 'Resolved / Rejected', date: '', done: false },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'q3', supplierId: 's3', supplierName: 'MedGrain Suppliers',
    type: 'HACCP', subject: 'Updated HACCP Plan Request',
    priority: 'medium', status: 'pending',
    raisedBy: 'Sarah Mitchell', raisedDate: '2026-03-12',
    dueDate: '2026-04-01',
    messages: [
      { id: 'm1', sender: 'Sarah Mitchell', direction: 'out', text: 'Please provide your updated HACCP plan for the new grain processing line.', date: '2026-03-12' },
    ],
    attachments: [],
    timeline: [
      { step: 'Query submitted', date: '2026-03-12', done: true },
      { step: 'Awaiting acknowledgement', date: '', active: true },
      { step: 'Resolved / Rejected', date: '', done: false },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'q4', supplierId: 's4', supplierName: 'FreshPack India',
    type: 'Non-Conformance', subject: 'NC Resolution – Packaging Non-Conformance',
    priority: 'medium', status: 'review',
    raisedBy: 'Priya Sharma', raisedDate: '2026-03-08',
    dueDate: '2026-03-30',
    messages: [
      { id: 'm1', sender: 'Priya Sharma', direction: 'out', text: 'A non-conformance was raised on batch #PK-2244. Please provide your CAPA report.', date: '2026-03-08' },
      { id: 'm2', sender: 'FreshPack Portal', direction: 'in', text: 'CAPA report is being prepared. Will submit by 20th March.', date: '2026-03-10' },
    ],
    attachments: [{ name: 'nc-batch-PK2244.pdf', uploadedBy: 'QA Team', date: '2026-03-08' }],
    timeline: [
      { step: 'NC raised', date: '2026-03-08', done: true },
      { step: 'Supplier notified', date: '2026-03-10', done: true },
      { step: 'CAPA under preparation', date: '', active: true },
      { step: 'Resolved / Rejected', date: '', done: false },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'q5', supplierId: 's2', supplierName: 'DairyFresh Co',
    type: 'Audit', subject: 'Annual Supplier Audit Scheduling',
    priority: 'low', status: 'pending',
    raisedBy: 'James Okafor', raisedDate: '2026-03-14',
    dueDate: '2026-04-30',
    messages: [
      { id: 'm1', sender: 'James Okafor', direction: 'out', text: 'Please confirm your availability for the annual supplier audit in April 2026.', date: '2026-03-14' },
    ],
    attachments: [],
    timeline: [
      { step: 'Query submitted', date: '2026-03-14', done: true },
      { step: 'Awaiting confirmation', date: '', active: true },
      { step: 'Audit scheduled', date: '', done: false },
      { step: 'Audit complete', date: '', done: false },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'q6', supplierId: 's5', supplierName: 'SpiceBlend GmbH',
    type: 'Certificate', subject: 'ISO 22000 Renewal Confirmation',
    priority: 'low', status: 'resolved',
    raisedBy: 'Priya Sharma', raisedDate: '2026-02-25',
    dueDate: '2026-03-10',
    messages: [
      { id: 'm1', sender: 'Priya Sharma', direction: 'out', text: 'Please confirm ISO 22000 renewal status.', date: '2026-02-25' },
      { id: 'm2', sender: 'SpiceBlend Portal', direction: 'in', text: 'Renewed. Certificate attached.', date: '2026-02-28' },
    ],
    attachments: [{ name: 'iso22000-renewed-2026.pdf', uploadedBy: 'SpiceBlend', date: '2026-02-28' }],
    timeline: [
      { step: 'Query submitted', date: '2026-02-25', done: true },
      { step: 'Certificate submitted', date: '2026-02-28', done: true },
      { step: 'Resolved', date: '2026-03-01', done: true },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'q7', supplierId: 's7', supplierName: 'AquaSpring Ltd',
    type: 'Audit', subject: 'BRC Audit Report Submission',
    priority: 'high', status: 'rejected',
    raisedBy: 'Sarah Mitchell', raisedDate: '2026-03-11',
    dueDate: '2026-03-15',
    messages: [
      { id: 'm1', sender: 'Sarah Mitchell', direction: 'out', text: 'Please submit your BRC audit report immediately.', date: '2026-03-11' },
      { id: 'm2', sender: 'AquaSpring Portal', direction: 'in', text: 'We do not have the BRC audit completed yet.', date: '2026-03-12' },
      { id: 'm3', sender: 'Sarah Mitchell', direction: 'out', text: 'This has been escalated. Query rejected pending compliance team review.', date: '2026-03-13' },
    ],
    attachments: [],
    timeline: [
      { step: 'Query submitted', date: '2026-03-11', done: true },
      { step: 'Supplier responded', date: '2026-03-12', done: true },
      { step: 'Rejected – escalated', date: '2026-03-13', done: true, isRejected: true },
    ]
  },
];

export const QUERY_TYPES = ['Allergen', 'HACCP', 'Certificate', 'Non-Conformance', 'Audit', 'Other'];
export const TEMPLATES = {
  allergen: { subject: 'Allergen Declaration Update Required', message: 'Please provide an updated allergen declaration for your products as required under our food safety policy.' },
  haccp: { subject: 'HACCP Certificate Renewal Required', message: 'Your HACCP certificate is due for renewal. Please submit the updated certificate at your earliest convenience.' },
  audit: { subject: 'Annual Supplier Audit Scheduling', message: 'We would like to schedule the annual food safety audit. Please confirm your availability for the proposed dates.' },
  nc: { subject: 'Non-Conformance Follow-Up', message: 'A non-conformance was identified in your recent delivery. Please provide a CAPA report within 7 days.' },
  iso: { subject: 'ISO 22000 Renewal Confirmation', message: 'Please confirm whether your ISO 22000 certification has been renewed and provide the updated certificate.' },
  brc: { subject: 'BRC Audit Report Submission Required', message: 'Please submit your latest BRC audit report as part of our supplier compliance review.' },
};
